auction_style: Andy Korbak is a calculated, patient strategist — the 2018 champion shows he can build a winning team. He's a Red Sox fan like Achille and Grossman. His trade approach reveals he prefers big, impactful deals over small moves: 'Looking a bigger deal, basically a top SP, for a top bat.' He checks league rules carefully before the draft (asking for the correct Fantrax rules link in 2026) and seems methodical. He tends to want top-end value at his positions of need.
price_tendency_detail: No direct auction price data. Trade behavior suggests he values elite bats at a premium — he declined to move Mookie Betts after just acquiring him and sought 'a top SP for a top bat' in negotiations, suggesting he prices stars correctly.
trade_style: Selective and deliberate. Korbak will put players on the block but takes his time responding (often traveling, on vacation). He declines to move his core players after recently acquiring them. In the Chathams negotiations, he was willing to deal Hader for Polanco but wanted bigger deals overall. He engages thoughtfully but won't be rushed.
notable_tendencies: Red Sox fan — may have hometown bias at auction alongside Achille and Achille's old partner
Took a family vacation 3/21-3/29 in 2026 — scheduling constraint that pushed draft date
Consistently jokes about Chathams' excessive roster moves: 'I'd like Chathams to keep posting about their moves... can you add why you decided to make the specific move'
Prefers large trades to small ones — explicitly said he was 'looking for a bigger deal' when Chathams offered a modest swap
Won 2018 title — proves capable of top-end results when he puts it together
Checks league rules carefully pre-draft — thorough preparer
intel_summary: Korbak is a patient, well-prepared competitor who won't panic-trade his best players. He builds for the big deal and is selective about what he moves. His Red Sox allegiance is worth noting at the auction. He tends to travel or be unavailable during key windows, which can make him hard to reach for in-season deals — if you want to trade with him, initiate early.
